fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document from which the pick originated.

fields.name: Document Subtype
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the component pick request is related to, such as Released and Assembly.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse document for which the program has received a pick request.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location in which the request is occurring.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code of the zone where the bin on the particular request is situated.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code of the bin on the pick request. It is the bin code on the warehouse shipment line or the To Bin Code field on the internal pick line.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Contains the status of the pick request. The options are: Open, Released.

fields.name: Completely Picked
fields.tooltip: Indicates whether all the items on the warehouse source document have been picked.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.
